Description: Resident can request OTP via phone/email and verify it to create/login to account.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a valid phone/email, when OTP is requested, then OTP is issued and rate-limited; Given correct OTP, when verified, then resident receives access token and must complete address before using schedule/payments.

Description: Capture address as State->LGA->Street->House No->Landmark; no postcode.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a resident without address, when they attempt schedule/home, then they are redirected to address verification; Address fields required: State,LGA,Street,HouseNo; Landmark optional.

Description: Render a monthly calendar for the resident's address showing bin type per day.
Acceptance Criteria: Given an address in LGA, when viewing month, then calendar lists scheduled bin types for that LGA; Bin types include General, Recycling, Garden, Food.

Description: Admin marks a public holiday; schedule for that week shifts by +1 day.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a holiday date for an LGA week, when generating calendar for that week, then all bin collections for that week move forward by 1 day and resident is shown a notice.

Description: Resident sees picked/missed/reported with timestamp for today, plus next pickup.
Acceptance Criteria: Given today's date, when collection is marked picked at time T, then resident home shows 'Picked up at T' without refresh; Next pickup date is computed from schedule.

Description: System generates invoices on the 1st of each month per address.
Acceptance Criteria: Given date is 1st, when job runs, then invoice is created with monthly fee + subscriptions; invoice status starts UNPAID.

Description: When payment completes, unpaid dashboards and resident owing status update in real-time.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a completed payment matching an invoice, when processed, then invoice becomes PAID and outstanding amount is 0; dashboards update without manual refresh.

Description: Finance officer can filter by LGA and see unpaid addresses with amounts and overdue days.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a selected LGA and month, when viewing dashboard, then list includes address, amount owing, days overdue, and payment history; updates stream in real-time.

Description: Fleet manager can CRUD vehicles and set status Active/Maintenance/OOS.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a fleet manager role, when creating/updating vehicle, then validation enforces unique license plate; vehicle appears in list with status.

Description: Route supervisor assigns staff and vehicles to a route for a day.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a route supervisor, when assigning driver/loaders/vehicle to route-date, then assignment is saved and available to driver app view.

Description: Resident reports missed bin with photo upload and description; admin gets it instantly.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a resident, when submitting issue with optional photo, then issue is created with audit trail and assigned supervisor notified; photo is stored and retrievable securely.

Description: Resident and assigned staff can exchange messages inside an issue.
Acceptance Criteria: Given an open issue, when either party sends a message, then message is stored with timestamp and visible to both; audit trail preserved.

Description: System sends push/SMS/email reminders about next collection for address.
Acceptance Criteria: Given next pickup exists, when T-24h window is reached, then reminder is queued; On collection day morning, then day-of reminder is queued; delivery results logged.
